config.loadError: Could not load the recording settings.
config.title: Recording settings
config.subtitle: Applies to recordings you start under Live. Every change is saved automatically.
config.splitHint: Splits the MP4 every N minutes; each part becomes a separate VOD. No split = a single continuous file.
config.snapshotHint: Saves an image of the room every N seconds to S3 (streamhub/<app>/snapshots/). Off = no snapshots.

title: Recordings (VODs)
subtitle: Every recording and every split part lands here. Play it back, view metadata or delete it.
empty: No recordings yet. Start a recording from Live.

download.error: Could not prepare the download. The VOD may not be ready yet.

probe.none: ffprobe could not read the recording's metadata.

delete.title: Delete VOD #{{id}}
delete.warning: This removes the recording from the database, the S3 bucket and the local file. It cannot be undone.
